name: Navy 24x30 Garage Shed Plan - A Craftsman Carriage-Style Garage with Stone Base & Dual Barn Doors
open_features: A tall, classic roofline provides excellent overhead clearance, long-term durability, and ideal interior height for shelving, loft storage, and workshop layouts.
Thoughtfully designed framing, clean structural lines, and builder-ready plans make this an accessible project for both beginners and experienced builders.
Wide navy double doors with upper glass panels offer smooth entry for vehicles, tools, and equipment while enhancing curb appeal.
Vertical cedar-look siding paired with rugged stone base details creates a balanced rustic-modern aesthetic with added durability and warmth.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Navy Garage Shed Plan - a 24x30 premium garage, workshop, and storage solution designed with clean architectural detailing, rustic elegance, and modern carriage-house charm. With its tall gable roof, warm vertical cedar-style siding, navy double garage doors, and durable stone wainscoting, the Navy stands out as both functional and beautifully refined.
